def positive_entire_dataframe_copied_for_transform():
    rule_id = "entire_dataframe_copied_for_transform"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Whole DataFrames are copied for transforms that could target a smaller subset or reuse views."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
